papers.title: Evaluation of the Clinical Spectrum of Diabetes and Obesity in Youth and Adults
papers.abstract:
Status: NOT_YET_RECRUITING; Conditions: Obesity, Diabetes, Metabolic Disorders; Background:

Diabetes and obesity are chronic diseases. They can affect blood flow and how the body processes nutrients, and complications over time can lead to early death.
